name: north-finance-career-os
description: North Finance Career OS mobile app prototype.

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www/assets && cp index.html styles.css aiClient.js app.js manifest.webmanifest sw.js www/ && cp assets/icon.svg www/assets/
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init "North Finance Career OS" com.northcareer.app --web-dir www
